items.description: Crash on I-95 southbound between Exit 12A/12B: PA 291 CARGO CITY / PHILADELPHIA INT'L AIRPORT and Exit 9B/9A: PA 420 - PROSPECT PARK / ESSINGTON. There is a lane restriction.
